parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Workspace numeric identifier. If omitted, lists datasets in a user context.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination. Default: `0`.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search filter to match against dataset names and descriptions.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort results by. Accepts `name`, `modified`, or `used`. Default: `name`.

parameters.name: sortDir
parameters.description: Sort direction for results. Accepts `asc` (ascending) or `desc` (descending). Default: `asc`.

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: Dataset visibility filter. Accepts `visible`, `hidden`, or `all`. Default: `visible`.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional attribute values to include in the response. Accepts `labels`. Returns `null` for omitted attributes.

items.description: Optional dataset response enrichment attribute. Accepts `labels`.
items.title: DatasetQueryAttribute
